query:
UPDATE pdf_export_config
               SET enabled = ?,
                   nextcloud_url = ?,
                   webdav_user = ?,
                   webdav_app_token = ?,
                   target_folder = ?,
                   weeks_horizon = ?,
                   cron_schedule = ?,
                   update_process = ?,
                   update_version = ?
               WHERE id = ?
